text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Are you leaving already, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'll be back soon, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Of course. Good luck...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...And don't lose.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't plan to. I'm heading out with the sole
intention to win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup. This 2,400-meter,
medium-distance turf race is held at Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Every year, stars from around the globe gather
here, and Japan gets swept up in a whirlwind of
enthusiasm for this world-class race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But today... just for today... I'm going to make
that world mine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A 2,400-meter, medium-distance turf race at
Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's right... This race is a classic distance, just
like a certain other race.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wow... I've never seen Maruzensky race before!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Boy, you're in for a treat, then! Plus, she's
squaring off against Chiyono O from the autumn
Tenno Sho. I wonder who'll win?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
The venue is more crowded than usual today, so
please proceed to your seats calmly and without
pushing!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But of course it's crowded. Who could say no to
watching a race with such a lineup?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
In one corner is the Umamusume who defeated
the Eternal Top Three. In the other, the legendary
Umamusume whose return no one expected.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: This will be a race like none other...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I am. There's nothing to waver about at this point.
There's only one thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to reach out and grab victory, and I
refuse to let it slip from my grasp.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I'm the pot, and you're the ladle,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I heard you calling out to me during the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. Your voice gave me the final push I
needed toward the end.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's why... When I'm out there...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Can you keep pushing me onward when I'm
running? With your support, I could run even to
the ends of the world.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Once I open these doors, go into the runners'
tunnel...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And head toward that bright, bright light at its
end...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting, Maruzen! How are you feeling
today?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I feel on the very tippy-top of the world,
Chiyo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I apologize in advance, though. My engine's been
roaring to go for so long, I'm afraid I won't be
able to hold back once we start.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So let the Beast gobble you right up, darling!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm not letting that happen. If anyone's
doing the devouring around here, it's going to be
me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Let's get out there and enjoy this
once-in-a-lifetime moment to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Maruzen
text_block_list.text: Our Derby awaits us.
